# Launch Rehearsal — Scorecard

| **Product** | Launch Rehearsal Dashboard |
| **Outcome** | complete |
| **Duration** | 106s |

| | |
|---|---|

| **Top delight** | Clear navigation structure |

| **Delights** | 7 |

| **Pages crawled** | 14 |
| **Auto journeys added** | 2 |

narrative.executiveSummary: Launch Rehearsal Dashboard at http://127.0.0.1:8081 rehearsed as **Green** readiness. 18/18 canonical steps passed (100%). 2 issue(s) and 3 delight(s) recorded. Primary concern: Console warnings on page. Bright spot: Clear navigation structure.
narrative.forFounders: **Launch readiness: Green** — suitable for a confident partner readout.
narrative.forEngineering:
Run `lr-self-20260601-071239` · 106s · 54 step records (incl. viewport/seed replays).
Crawl: 14 pages, 0 error paths, 0 orphans.
Notable P2: Console noise spike across run.
suggestedQuestions: What polish items (P3) are worth doing before GA?
Which journey had the worst persona × path outcome?
Did any step show flaky behavior across seeds or viewports?

layer1Verdict.headline: Ready to ship.
layer1Verdict.reason: 100% of canonical steps passed with no journey-breaking failures. Polish opportunity: Console noise spike across run.

narrative.layer2Story: TryLapse sent 3 AI personas through 6 product journeys and scored **18/18** steps as passing. All journeys completed successfully across all tested personas. 3 genuine product strength(s) found: Clear navigation structure.

layer3FixHierarchy.title: Console noise spike across run
layer3FixHierarchy.detail: Captured 0 console error(s) and 16 warning(s) across canonical steps — review network-log and step artifacts.
layer3FixHierarchy.action: Fix before GA — noticeable but not blocking.

layer3FixHierarchy.title: Console warnings on page
layer3FixHierarchy.detail: 16 warning(s): Generated path "/runs/" for route "/runs/$runId" matched route "/runs/" instead. This can happen when multiple route tem

layer4Forward: Expand coverage: add edge-case journeys for error states and empty states.
Double down on strength: Clear navigation structure — amplify in onboarding.
Run again after fixes to confirm the score moved — track trend across builds.

layer5Trend.note: Run a second build to see score trajectory.
